rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS RAYMOND BROWN, MACK WATSON and THETIUS PINKARD's Motion For Judgment On The Pleading DENIED. Defendants' status as volunteer directors does not appear on the face of the complaint, and Defendants have not properly requested judicial notice of the necessary facts. Cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress, coupled with allegations of conspiracy, is sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reconsideration Of Court'S Order Sustaining Def Chicago Title Insurance Company'S Demurrer To Pltff'S Third Amended Complaint

PLAINTIFFS SUSAN MAYO, ELEXANDRIA DIETZ, ROBERT WEISS, PATRICIA WEISS, MEGAN FAULKNER, SIRR LESS, TIMOTHY DIETZ and JAMES DZIURA's Motion For Reconsideration Of Court's Order Sustaining Defendant Chicago Title Insurance Company's Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Third Amended Complaint Continued to October 9, 2013 on Court's own motion. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reconsideration Of Court'S Order Sustaining Def Chicago Title Insurance Company'S Demurrer To Pltff'S Third Amended Complaint

rulings.Case Title: GIGI ELLIS VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANYs DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the cause of action for fraud is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to comply with the court's prior order and allege facts showing tolling. Conclusory allegation in 38 is insufficient and no possible amendment has been suggested in the opposition. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to wrongful eviction cause of action. Plaintiff concedes that it is premature. Demurrer is overruled as to cause of action for IIED. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Kruse is inapposite. "A party is not subject to liability for infliction of emotional distress when it has merely pursued its own economic interests and properly asserted its legal rights." Here, whether Defendants asserted their legal rights properly is an issue of fact that cannot be addressed on demurrer. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: GIGI ELLIS VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: AARON T LEONE VS. BANK OF AMERICA HOME LOANS SERVICING L.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT IMPAC COMPANIES, and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised by demurrer regarding Plaintiff's causes of action for breach of contract, accounting and negligence. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: LUCILA GONZALEZ VS. US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised by demurrer regarding Plaintiff's causes of action for (1) lack of standing to foreclose; (2) fraud in the concealment; (3) fraud in the inducement; (4) IIED; (5) Quiet Title; (6) Slander of Title; (7) Declaratory Relief; (8) Violation of CCC 2932.5; (9) Violation of B&P 17200; and (10) accounting. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 10 days form the notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: LUCILA GONZALEZ VS. US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: TRUSTEE, HELEN MOORE TRUST VS. LESANNE CASSULO
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT LESANNE CASSULO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to October 9, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than October 3, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: PEAK REALTY GROUP INC. VS. LAURA WHARTON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT LAURA WHARTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Plaintiff is entitled to reasonable inference that the date of termination of tenancy is 3 days following service of the "3 Day Notice." The complaint is not fatally uncertain. Defendant shall have 5 days from the notice of entry of order to file answer. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA NICOLAUS HARRIS VS. ALEXIS FRIES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft'S To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Documents To Deem Matters Admitted And Req. For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 2, 2013, line 9. PLAINTIFF ANNA HARRIS' Motion To Compel Defendent's To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Documents To Deem Matters Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions Moot, responses served on September 26, 2013. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $60 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Moving party to prepare order. = (501/PJB)
